description: This email template is a celebration of all things geeky, from computers and electronics to gaming and outer space. It's designed to build anticipation with a countdown to Geek Pride Day, a global observance recognizing the contributions and passions of geeks worldwide. The design features a dark mode theme, appealing to tech enthusiasts and gamers who prefer this aesthetic. Graphics of planets and references to "the force" add a whimsical touch, capturing the spirit of popular sci-fi culture. This template is suitable for use in the fields of software and technology, media and entertainment, and gaming, making it a versatile choice for a variety of geek-centric communications.
short_description: Celebrate Geek Pride Day with our unique email template. Perfect for tech and gaming enthusiasts, it features a sleek dark mode, outer space elements, and a countdown to the big day. Express your geek pride globally in style.

designer.description:
I am a creative multidisciplinary person, with a broad vision in the world of design and communication. 
All of this, thanks to extensive experience in different fields: web design, online design, corporate identity, creation of web structures and functionalities, illustration, audiovisuals, apps, and even digital art.
